media_identities.claim_text: Trelleborg: ‘Diesel fuel’; Parker: ‘hydrocarbon based fuels’. These exact source labels are bound to this AI-only diesel-fuel candidate.
Trelleborg: ‘Brake fluids (based on glycol ether)’; Parker: ‘glycol based brake fluid’. These exact source labels are bound to this AI-only medium candidate.
Trelleborg: ‘Water steam’; Parker: ‘Superheated water steam’. These exact source labels are bound to this AI-only water-steam candidate.

rules.application_scope: General source-level material-family exclusion screening only; not compound or component approval.
rules.claim_text: ACM is unsuitable for glycol-ether-based brake fluid in general material-family screening.
rules.condition: source-defined family screening; compound and application verification required
rules.conditions_and_exclusions: No compound, formulation, crosslink, product, dynamic duty or application release is inferred; verify the actual compound and application.
rules.seal_type_scope: O-ring and elastomer sealing applications described by both cited guides; no component release.
rules.temperature_scope: No temperature extension beyond the cited source statements; application temperature remains an open input.

rules.application_scope: General source-level material-family exclusion screening only; not compound or component approval.
rules.claim_text: ACM is unsuitable for water steam above 150 °C in general material-family screening.
rules.condition: water steam above 150 °C; compound and application verification required
rules.conditions_and_exclusions: No lower-temperature steam conclusion, compound, formulation, product, dynamic duty or application release is inferred.
rules.seal_type_scope: O-ring and elastomer sealing applications described by both cited guides; no component release.
rules.temperature_scope: Water steam strictly above 150 °C; no statement at or below 150 °C.

rules.application_scope: General source-level material-family exclusion screening only; not compound or component approval.
rules.claim_text: NBR is unsuitable for glycol-ether-based brake fluid in general material-family screening.
rules.condition: source-defined family screening; compound and application verification required
rules.conditions_and_exclusions: No compound, acrylonitrile content, formulation, product, dynamic duty or application release is inferred.
rules.seal_type_scope: O-ring and elastomer sealing applications described by both cited guides; no component release.
rules.temperature_scope: No temperature extension beyond the cited source statements; application temperature remains an open input.

rules.application_scope: General source-level material-family exclusion screening only; not compound or component approval.
rules.claim_text: NBR is unsuitable for water steam above 150 °C in general material-family screening.
rules.condition: water steam above 150 °C; compound and application verification required
rules.conditions_and_exclusions: Trelleborg rates the row U; Parker supplies the family heat boundary, not a separate steam-compatibility rating; no lower-temperature or compound conclusion is inferred.
rules.seal_type_scope: O-ring and elastomer sealing applications described by both cited guides; no component release.
rules.temperature_scope: Water steam strictly above 150 °C; Parker states NBR heat resistance to 100 °C with shorter life at 121 °C.

rules.application_scope: General source-level material-family exclusion screening only; not compound or component approval.
rules.claim_text: VMQ is unsuitable for diesel fuel in general material-family screening.
rules.condition: source-defined family screening; compound and application verification required
rules.conditions_and_exclusions: The rule is limited to diesel fuel within the broader Parker hydrocarbon-fuel exclusion; no fuel-mixture, compound or application extrapolation is inferred.
rules.seal_type_scope: O-ring and elastomer sealing applications described by both cited guides; no component release.
rules.temperature_scope: No temperature extension beyond the cited source statements; application temperature remains an open input.
